sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: First Financial Bancorp (NASDAQ:FFBC) Reports Record Adjusted Earnings Despite Revenue Miss in Q4 2025
feed.summary: First Financial Bancorp (NASDAQ:FFBC) announced fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, reporting record adjusted earnings per share of $0.80, significantly beating analyst estimates. However, the company's revenue of $238.8 million missed expectations, leading to a slight negative market reaction. Despite the revenue shortfall, the company highlighted strong operational profitability and a commitment to shareholder returns through dividends.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) Given New $210.00 Price Target at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $210.00 from $185.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 9.55% for the transportation company's stock. The article also details recent analyst ratings, stock performance, earnings results, and insider trading activities for CHRW.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company lowered its price target for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) from $525.00 to $520.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This adjustment comes after Lennox International missed Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, reporting $4.45 EPS against a consensus of $4.76 and revenue of $1.20 billion versus $1.27 billion. Despite the misses, the company provided FY 2026 guidance, and several other analysts have also revised their price targets and ratings on the stock.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Issues Positive Forecast for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) from $150 to $155, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying an 11.09% upside. This positive outlook follows Gilead's recent earnings beat, where EPS exceeded estimates, though insider selling of shares was noted. The biopharmaceutical company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with various firms also adjusting their price targets upwards.

feed.title: Tractor Supply shares slide nearly 6% after Q4 earnings miss
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. (TSCO) shares fell almost 6% following its fourth-quarter earnings report, where the company missed revenue estimates despite strong comparable store sales growth and a diluted EPS increase. The company provided a cautious outlook for fiscal year 2024, expecting 1.8% to 3.5% comparable store sales growth and diluted EPS between $9.85 and $10.50. Despite the miss, management expressed confidence in their long-term "Life Out Here" strategy.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price ETF targets 150-250 innovation leaders across sectors
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has launched a new active ETF, the T. Rowe Price Innovation Leaders ETF (TNXT), focusing on companies leading innovation across various sectors including technology, healthcare, and financials. The ETF is co-managed by Sean McWilliams and Som Priestley, features a net expense ratio of 0.49%, and aims to hold between 150-250 companies. This addition brings T. Rowe Price's active ETF lineup to 31 funds, leveraging the firm's global research platform for dynamic portfolio management.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE INTRODUCES NEW THEMATIC ACTIVE ETF FOCUSED ON COMPANIES LEADING INNOVATION
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has launched the T. Rowe Price Innovation Leaders ETF (TNXT), an active ETF designed to provide diversified exposure to leading innovative companies across various sectors, including technology, healthcare, and finance. Co-managed by Sean McWilliams and Som Priestley, the ETF aims for 150-250 holdings and focuses on dynamic portfolio adjustments and disciplined risk management, offering investors a new way to access long-term innovation themes. This new offering brings T. Rowe Price's total active ETFs to 31, emphasizing tax efficiency and competitive expense ratios.

feed.title: Software stocks enter bear market on AI disruption fear with ServiceNow plunging 11% Thursday
feed.summary: Software stocks have entered a bear market, with the iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (IGV) dropping about 5% and now down 21% from its recent high. This downturn is primarily driven by growing fears that artificial intelligence could disrupt the business models of many software firms. Even companies like ServiceNow, which reported solid earnings and better-than-expected guidance, saw its shares plunge over 11% due to heightened investor skepticism about incumbent application vendors in the face of AI competition.

feed.title: Kroger Fuels Protein Goals with Expanded Simple Truth™ Line Now Featuring More Than 110 Items
feed.summary: Kroger has expanded its Simple Truth™ Protein line to include over 110 products, adding 24 new affordable and protein-packed options to help customers achieve their wellness goals. The new offerings, available exclusively at Kroger, are free from unwanted ingredients and designed for various times of day, including high-protein cereals, beef sticks, water enhancers, cottage cheese, and energy bars. This expansion aims to provide nutritious, cost-effective, and great-tasting protein choices to support health and fitness resolutions.

feed.title: Gartner stock hits 52-week low at 220.76 USD
feed.summary: Gartner Inc. (NYSE: IT) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $220.76, reflecting a significant downturn with a 1-year return of -58.0% and a 6-month drop of -35.51%. Despite recent positive Q3 2025 earnings which beat Wall Street expectations, analysts like Truist Securities, UBS, and BMO Capital have adjusted their ratings and price targets, indicating ongoing market pressures and potential challenges for the company. Investors are looking to upcoming earnings on February 3rd for further clarity.

feed.title: Ford Named Official Vehicle of the LPGA Tour in Multi-Year Partnership
feed.summary: Ford has been designated as the official vehicle of the LPGA Tour through a new multi-year partnership. This collaboration aligns the automotive giant with the Ladies Professional Golf Association. The announcement marks a significant partnership for both organizations.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin stock hits all-time high at 954.31 USD
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation's stock reached an all-time high of $954.31 USD, reflecting a 38.96% increase over the past year due to strong investor confidence and strategic initiatives. The company has a history of 56 consecutive years of dividend payments and 9 consecutive years of dividend increases, showcasing its financial stability. Despite a high P/E ratio, recent fiscal second-quarter adjusted earnings exceeded analyst expectations, driven by record sales and improved margins, reinforcing a positive outlook for investors and analysts

feed.title: Only 4% of 20,000 firms hit CDP 'A'—Genpact joins them
feed.summary: Genpact (NYSE: G) announced it has achieved a CDP 'A' rating in the Climate Action category, placing it among the top 4% of nearly 20,000 companies scored. This recognition highlights Genpact's strong climate governance, validated SBTi net zero targets, and alignment with ISSB/IFRS2 climate standards, demonstrating its leadership in environmental transparency and performance. The company attributes this success to its commitment to operating with integrity, delivering measurable environmental impact, and maintaining transparent, rigorous climate reporting across its global teams.

feed.title: Truist Trims Packaging Corp. of America to $270 From $273, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist has adjusted its price target for Packaging Corp. of America (PKG) to $270 from $273, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This update follows a series of recent analyst adjustments and company news, including the Q4 2025 earnings call and reports of missed quarterly results due to softer demand and higher costs. The company's stock has seen various price target changes from other firms such as JPMorgan, UBS, BNP Paribas Exane, Citigroup, and Wells Fargo, highlighting ongoing analyst evaluations of its performance and outlook.

feed.title: Newmont Goldcorp stock hits all-time high at 134.33 USD
feed.summary: Newmont Goldcorp (NEM) stock has reached an all-time high of $134.33, demonstrating a 222.64% one-year return and strong investor confidence. Despite this, the company faces potential production impacts from bushfire damage at its Boddington operations and has seen mixed analyst ratings, with Raymond James raising its target while BNP Paribas Exane downgraded the stock due to valuation concerns. The company also recently sold a portion of its stake in Fuerte Metals Corporation.

feed.title: GM is epitomizing the US auto industry's profit, politics balancing act under Trump
feed.summary: The article discusses how General Motors (GM) exemplifies the challenge faced by the U.S. auto industry in balancing profit motives with political considerations under the Trump administration. This situation highlights the complex relationship between corporate strategy and government policy in a highly regulated sector.

feed.title: Ford, LPGA expand partnership with official vehicle, mentorship agreements
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company and the LPGA have announced a multi-year partnership, building on an agreement that began in 2024. The new collaboration designates Ford as the Official Vehicle of the LPGA Tour and introduces the "Power Her Drive" mentorship program. This initiative aims to support newly professional women golfers in their first two years, providing resources and investing in their future success.

feed.title: GCL Announces Trailer for Upcoming WWII Release ‘The Defiant’
feed.summary: GCL Global Holdings Ltd. has released a trailer for "The Defiant," a new World War II story-driven first-person shooter developed by Hoothanes and published by its subsidiary 4Divinity Pte. Ltd. The game focuses on China’s War of Resistance against Japan, offering a fresh perspective on the Asian theatre of WWII. "The Defiant" aims to deliver a cinematic, authentic experience with a human-centered approach to storytelling, featuring accurate historical weapons and diverse combat scenarios.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Norfolk Southern Q4 2025 beats EPS expectations
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing EPS forecasts by 16.25% with an EPS of $3.22 against an expected $2.77, while revenue matched predictions at $3 billion. The company highlighted significant operational efficiencies, including improved safety metrics and productivity gains, and outlined strategic priorities for 2026 focused on safety, service reliability, and cost control. Despite facing challenges like tariff volatility and competitive pressures, particularly in intermodal markets, Norfolk Southern remains committed to its growth strategy, including an impending merger with Union Pacific, aiming to create the first transcontinental rail network.

feed.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon lead up to $100B OpenAI investment: report
feed.summary: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Amazon are reportedly in discussions to invest up to $60 billion in OpenAI, as part of a larger funding round that could reach $100 billion. This investment would value OpenAI between $730 billion and $830 billion. The funding aims to support OpenAI's expansion of compute capacity and product development, especially as the company faces significant costs related to training and operating large-scale AI models.

feed.title: G2 to Acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner
feed.summary: G2, the world's largest software marketplace, announced its agreement to acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner, Inc. This acquisition consolidates four major B2B software review platforms, aiming to create the largest source of online data and software insights. The move is expected to enhance AI-driven search, provide more verified customer reviews, and expand reach for software buyers and vendors, with the transaction anticipated to close in Q1 2026.

feed.title: Four top software review sites unite under G2 in AI era
feed.summary: G2, the leading software marketplace, has announced its agreement to acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner. This acquisition will merge four major B2B software review platforms, creating an expansive database of 6 million verified reviews, reaching over 200 million annual buyers, and serving more than 10,000 vendors. The deal is set to enhance AI-driven search capabilities, provide more robust buyer intent data, and offer new opportunities for vendors and partners, with an expected closure in Q1 2026.

feed.title: G2 to Acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner
feed.summary: G2, the world's largest software marketplace, announced its agreement to acquire Capterra, Software Advice, and GetApp from Gartner, INC. This acquisition aims to create the largest source of online data and software insights by combining four top B2B software review platforms. The integration is expected to enhance G2's capabilities in AI-driven search, provide more comprehensive insights for buyers, and boost visibility and lead generation for software vendors.

feed.title: Omnicom Appoints Jantzen Bridges as Global President of Credera
feed.summary: Omnicom has appointed Jantzen Bridges as Global President of Credera. She will be responsible for strategies related to AI-driven enterprise transformation programs and will leverage Omnicom's creative and media capabilities to enhance client growth. Bridges brings over 20 years of experience from global consulting firms, guiding Fortune 500 clients through technology-enabled transformations.

feed.title: Nisource stock hits all-time high at 44.95 USD
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. (NI) stock has reached an all-time high of $44.95, reflecting strong investor confidence and solid performance. The company has demonstrated financial stability with a 24.41% total return over the past year and a 40-year streak of consistent dividend payments, currently yielding 2.71%. Recent developments include a declared quarterly dividend, reaffirmed fiscal year 2025 guidance, and new fiscal year 2026 guidance, alongside an announced $15 billion Amazon data center campus.

feed.title: Hubbell Inc stock hits all-time high at 498.68 USD
feed.summary: Hubbell Inc. stock has reached an all-time high of $498.68, marking a significant milestone for the company with a market capitalization of $26.5 billion. The stock has risen 17.83% over the past year, driven by strong financial performance and investor confidence, which InvestingPro analysts rate as "GREAT." The company has also announced plans to redeem senior notes and received analyst coverage, with Evercore ISI initiating an Outperform rating and a $575 price target.

feed.title: PulteGroup’s fourth-quarter profit falls 45% on lower home sale revenues
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc. reported a significant 45% drop in its fourth-quarter profit, falling to $502 million due to lower home sale revenues and tighter margins. Despite improvements in housing affordability from lower mortgage rates, consumer confidence continued to impact homebuyer demand. The company's full-year 2025 results show $16.7 billion in home sale revenues and $2.2 billion in net income, with a strategic focus on operational efficiency and disciplined capital allocation for the evolving U.S. housing market.

feed.title: Hershey’s Brand-New Release Is ‘Its Boldest Candy Yet’
feed.summary: Hershey's Jolly Rancher brand is launching new "Heat Wave Gummies," which blend sweet fruit flavors with a chili-inspired finish, tapping into the growing "swicy" food trend. These new gummies will feature flavors like Mango, Pineapple, Watermelon, Lime, and Citrus Punch, offering a warm, tingly sensation. The candy is set to hit shelves in late February 2026 and comes with a limited-edition collaboration with VeeFriends, including a special Collector’s Box.

feed.title: Emerson Electric stock hits all-time high at 151.85 USD
feed.summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) stock has reached an all-time high of $151.85, reflecting a 16.25% increase over the past year and strong investor confidence. While analyst targets suggest further upside potential, InvestingPro's Fair Value assessment indicates the current price may be overvalued. Recent analyst updates show mixed views, with upgrades from UBS and Evercore ISI, and downgrades from Oppenheimer, TD Cowen, and Jefferies due to valuation concerns and portfolio transformation completion.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Elizabeth B Chandler Unloads $136K Of Rollins Stock
feed.summary: Elizabeth B Chandler, CLO at Rollins (NYSE: ROL), recently sold 2,151 shares of company stock valued at $136,072. Rollins is a global leader in pest control services, known for its Orkin brand, and has shown positive revenue growth and prudent debt management. However, its EPS is below the industry average, and its stock may be considered overvalued based on its Price to Sales ratio.

feed.title: Executive Chairman Of Rollins Sold $476K In Stock
feed.summary: John Wilson, Executive Chairman of Rollins (NYSE: ROL), sold 7,538 shares of the company's stock for $476,853, according to a recent SEC filing. Rollins, a global leader in pest control services, demonstrates positive revenue growth and strong gross margins, though its EPS is below industry norms. Insider transactions, such as this sale, can offer insights into a company's prospects alongside other financial analyses.

feed.title: 612K Reasons To Be Bullish On Merck & Co Stock
feed.summary: Joseph Romanelli, President at Merck & Co (NYSE: MRK), recently purchased 5,703 shares worth $612,502, signaling positive anticipation for the stock. Merck & Co demonstrates strong financial health with positive revenue growth, sound debt management, and favorable valuation metrics compared to industry peers. The company excels in profitability and holds a significant market capitalization.

feed.title: EVP At Merck & Co Buys $1.24M of Stock
feed.summary: Jennifer Zachary, EVP at Merck & Co (NYSE: MRK), recently purchased 11,583 shares totaling $1,244,014, signaling confidence in the company. Merck & Co exhibits positive financials with 3.72% revenue growth, a strong gross margin of 77.69%, and favorable valuation metrics including a P/E ratio of 14.14 and a low debt-to-equity ratio. These insider transactions, company performance, and valuation insights offer investors valuable data points to consider.

feed.title: International Paper to be split into two companies | News
feed.summary: Memphis-based International Paper announced it will split into two separate companies. The North American operations will retain the International Paper name, while the European packaging solutions business will be known as EMEA Packaging. This separation aims to create two focused, sustainable packaging companies with distinct management teams and financial strategies, and is expected to be completed in 12-15 months.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark shareholders approve acquisition of Kenvue
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark shareholders have approved the acquisition of Kenvue, the maker of Tylenol, in a significant step towards finalizing the $48.7 billion deal. The approval saw 96% of Kimberly-Clark's shares present at the special meeting vote in favor, while Kenvue's shareholders gave 99% approval. The acquisition now awaits regulatory approval and is anticipated to close in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Pepsi Lures Coca-Cola’s Popular Polar Bears to Super Bowl in Soda-Wars Surprise
feed.summary: Pepsi is escalating its cola wars with Coca-Cola by featuring a polar bear, traditionally associated with Coke, in its Super Bowl LX ad. The commercial shows the polar bear switching allegiance to Pepsi Zero Sugar, highlighting the growing consumer preference for zero-sugar beverages. This move continues a long-standing rivalry between the two companies, with Pepsi often using the Super Bowl to poke fun at its competitor.

feed.title: Hubbell showcases grid automation breakthroughs at DTECH 2026
feed.summary: Hubbell is set to introduce new advancements in grid automation and intelligent infrastructure at DTECH 2026, including the launch of Aclara360 software. The company will also share results from an extensive pilot program for its LineDefender™ single-phase recloser and display integrated substation solutions. Hubbell experts are scheduled to deliver several presentations on emerging automation strategies and advanced analytics.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Orders Two New Discovery Class Ships, With Option to Build Four More
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two new "Discovery Class" ships from the Chantiers de l'Atlantique shipyard, with an option to build four more. The first ship is expected to launch in 2029, followed by the second in 2032. Michael Bayley, President and CEO of Royal Caribbean International, stated that the new class will offer unique, immersive experiences designed to surprise and delight guests.

feed.title: WWII shooter 'The Defiant' puts players in China’s fight against Japan
feed.summary: GCL Global Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: GCL) has released a trailer for "The Defiant," a story-driven WWII first-person shooter developed by Hoothanes and published by their subsidiary, 4Divinity. The game focuses on China’s War of Resistance against Japan, offering a unique historical perspective rarely explored in WWII games. It will be available on PC via Steam and consoles, with wishlisting currently open.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of ImmunityBio, Inc. - IBRX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against ImmunityBio, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) on behalf of its investors. This investigation follows a 12.13% stock price drop after the company announced updated Phase 2 clinical results for its glioblastoma treatment, noting that the primary endpoint of "median overall survival" had not yet been reached. Investors affected by the stock decline are encouraged to contact the law firm.

feed.title: Coldwell Banker Real Estate Announces 2025 Year-End Award Winners
feed.summary: Coldwell Banker Real Estate LLC has announced its 2025 year-end award recipients, recognizing top-performing affiliated sales professionals, teams, offices, and companies. The awards highlight excellence in various categories, including adjusted gross commission income, total units, and lease income, with Jason Waugh, president of Coldwell Banker Affiliates, commending their dedication to exceptional service.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark shareholders approve acquisition of Kenvue
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark shareholders have approved the acquisition of Kenvue, the maker of Tylenol, in a significant step towards finalizing the $48.7 billion deal. The approval saw 96% of Kimberly-Clark shares present at the special meeting vote in favor, with Kenvue shareholders giving 99% approval. The acquisition is now awaiting regulatory approval and is expected to close in the second half of this year.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines stock hits 52-week high at 45.08 USD
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) stock reached a new 52-week high of $45.08, reflecting robust growth with a 44.15% increase over the past year and 32.7% gains in the last six months. Despite a premium valuation with a P/E ratio of nearly 62 and trading above its Fair Value according to InvestingPro, analysts offer mixed opinions on its valuation. The airline also reported Q4 earnings that slightly beat expectations, though revenue missed, while providing strong 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Honeywell beats estimates as orders rise, aerospace spin-off timeline moves up (HON:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Honeywell International (HON) exceeded Wall Street expectations in its latest quarter, driven by strong demand in aerospace and building automation, alongside a significant increase in new orders. The company also announced an accelerated timeline for the spin-off of its aerospace division. Despite some one-time charges impacting profit, Honeywell provided an optimistic outlook for 2026 with projected sales and earnings growth.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Completes $3.3B Acquisition Of Chronosphere For AI Observability Push
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has completed its $3.35 billion acquisition of Chronosphere, a next-gen observability provider, to bolster its capabilities in AI observability and security. This move integrates Chronosphere's technology with Palo Alto Networks' Cortex AgentiX platform and allows the Chronosphere Telemetry Pipeline to remain a standalone offering. The acquisition, along with the planned CyberArk deal, aims to strengthen Palo Alto Networks' foundation for AI and agentic adoption, addressing the growing observability needs driven by AI workloads.

feed.title: Snap-On stock hits all-time high at 375.28 USD
feed.summary: Snap-On Inc. (SNA) stock has reached an all-time high of $375.28, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 7.68% total return over the past year. The company demonstrates robust financial health with a current ratio of 4.4, minimal debt, and a history of 55 consecutive years of dividend payments, recently increasing its quarterly dividend by 14% to $2.44 per share. This performance is attributed to strategic initiatives and market positioning, highlighted by impressive gross profit margins and strong five-year returns.

feed.title: Wolfe Adjusts Price Target on C.H. Robinson Worldwide to $206 From $188, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe has raised its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) to $206 from the previous $188, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm. The report by MT Newswires on January 29, 2026, also noted multiple other analyst firms making similar adjustments to their price targets for C.H. Robinson Worldwide.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ameriprise Financial beats Q4 2025 forecasts
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding analyst expectations with an EPS of $10.83 and revenue of $4.96 billion. The company saw significant growth in assets under management, increased advisor productivity, and strong client flows, leading to a 5.55% surge in its stock price pre-market. Ameriprise remains focused on strategic investments in technology and AI, aiming for 4-5% organic growth in its Advice & Wealth Management segment, while maintaining a strong capital return strategy.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Cuts Price Target on Automatic Data Processing to $274 From $311, Keeps Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Automatic Data Processing (ADP) to $274 from $311, while maintaining an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment follows several other recent analyst revisions and comes amidst ADP's recent financial announcements, including increased adjusted earnings and revenue for fiscal Q2 and an updated fiscal 2026 outlook. The company also announced a $6 billion stock buyback authorization and kept its quarterly dividend at $1.70 per share.

feed.title: Omnicom names Jantzen Bridges as global president of Credera
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) has appointed Jantzen Bridges as Global President of Credera, its enterprise transformation consultancy. Bridges, with over 20 years of experience from major consulting firms, will focus on shaping service and delivery strategy and leading AI-enabled transformation programs. This move aligns with Omnicom's broader strategy to enhance its AI and data capabilities, following recent integrations and positive analyst ratings.
